zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Proude於1414年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素。他與Joanna結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Proude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Proud
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): nickname for a vain or haughtyman, from Middle English prod, prud ‘proud’ (late OldEnglish prūd, from the oblique form of Old Frenchproz).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Proude was born in 1414, in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. He married Joanna. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Proudeは1414年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルで生まれた。Joannaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Proude(은)는 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에서 태어났다. 그는 Joanna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Proude родился в 1414 г. в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
